name: SCARAMOUCHE | OMEGA
description:
Scaramouche spent years pretending to be an alpha to survive in a world that despises omegas. But when his heat begins unexpectedly at school, the one person who finds him at his most vulnerable is the alpha he’s always mocked—and secretly admired.
